video:video.video:title: Alycia - Saved by Travel Insurance
video:video.video:description: Alycia Fernie, BC Alycia was enjoying some tropical heat, until she didn’t feel so hot. A nearly $3,000 claim helped her feel better.

video:video.video:title: Virgin Voyages Says No Kids On The Ocean
A Sneak Peek of Celebrity Beyond℠
video:video.video:description:
More space. More luxury. More connected. Celebrity Beyond℠.
Welcome to a place where you can escape and experience all the things you’ve been missing for so long. Only now, those things are even better than you’ve imagined. This is a place where the everyday gives way to the extraordinary. A place with more space to lose yourself in and more luxury to love. Where the possibilities are as endless as the views. Where you can disconnect entirely while you reconnect with each other—and the world. This place is Celebrity Beyond. ---------- NOTICE: Prior to booking, please consult all applicable U.S. Centers for Disease Control travel advisories, warnings, or recommendations relating to cruise travel, at cdc.gov/travel/notices. If a certain threshold level of COVID-19 is detected onboard the ship during your voyage, the voyage will end immediately, the ship will return to the port of embarkation, and your subsequent travel, including your return home, may be restricted or delayed. Health and safety protocols, guest conduct rules, and regional travel restrictions vary by ship and destination, and are subject to change without notice. Due to evolving health protocols, imagery and messaging may not accurately reflect onboard and destination experiences, offerings, features, or itineraries. These may not be available during your voyage, may vary by ship and destination, and may be subject to change without notice. ----------
----------
Official Celebrity Cruises Website: https://www.CelebrityCruises.com
Browse Cruise Itineraries: https://www.celebritycruises.com/itinerary-search
Subscribe to Celebrity Cruises on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/CELEBRITYCRUISES/?sub_confirmation=1

video:video.video:title: Turks & Caicos, Grace Bay Beach - By Drone | Centre Holidays
video:video.video:description: Drone flight over Turks & Caicos' Grace Bay Beach.

video:video.video:title: TURTLE BAY | SUPER NATURAL
video:video.video:description:
Hawaii’s legendary Turtle Bay Resort has opened its doors following a major transformation that completely embraces the captivating beauty and natural splendor of Oahu’s North Shore. Set on 1,300 pristine oceanfront acres, Turtle Bay Resort immerses visitors in its stunning landscape, nestled alongside five miles of coastline with secluded sandy beaches, a working farm, and world-famous surf breaks. Guests of the resort can enjoy a host of curated, elevated experiences that invigorate the body and soul. Whether lounging with a hand-crafted Mai Tai at one of three brand new pools, horseback riding on the beach, riding the waves with a local surf instructor, relaxing at the spa or enjoying the new locally-focused culinary concepts, guests will be enveloped in a sense of place, found nowhere else in the world.
Visit us online for more information at www.turtlebayresort.com
Subscribe to our channel by clicking the link: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=turtlebayresort
Following Turtle Bay Resort: Instagram: http://instagram.com/turtlebayresort Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/turtlebayresort Twitter: https://twitter.com/turtlebayresort

video:video.video:title: #SafeTogether - Low Density Resorts
video:video.video:description:
Vacation with more peace of mind at Club Med's spacious all-inclusive resorts. Surrounded by nature, operating at a limited capacity, and featuring three story building (max.) no higher than the surrounding palm trees. Our resorts offer a safe environment to relax and unwind. Airy outdoor areas, al fresco restaurants and bars, sprawling beaches, endless outdoor activities allow you to disconnect enjoy quality family time - all in paradise.
► For more videos, subscribe to our channel : http://clbmd.co/youtube
► Who are we ? Since 1950, Club Med and its 80 villages make you feel at home while away from home in uniques and preserved heaven-on-earth locations. All-inclusive holidays have the power to transform your journey: Bring home new moves, curiosity, confidence and togetherness that fosters understanding and helps you reconnect lastingly with what matters.
We reinvent holidays with WW Resorts & All-inclusive experiences in order to ignite people’s true sense of amazement. Thanks to the uniqueness of our resorts locations, the kindness and professionalism of our GO, the affluence of our activities and services you will be inspired, see things otherwise, blossom and to return enriched with new perspectives.
On our channel you will discover our villages all around the world. You won't miss our actualities from renovations to openings. Last but not least, we will help you extend the experience by living your life like in a Club Med village.
Go to our website : http://www.clubmed.com
► Find us also on : Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/clubmed Twitter : https://twitter.com/ClubMed Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/clubmed Pinterest : https://www.pinterest.com/clubmed
#ClubMed #AmazingYou

video:video.video:title: Club Med Cancún - Now Open
video:video.video:description:

We reinvent holidays with WW Resorts & All-inclusive experiences in order to ignite people’s true sense of amazement. Thanks to the uniqueness of our resorts locations, the kindness and professionalism of our GO, the affluence of our activities and services you will be inspired, see things otherwise, blossom and to return enriched with new perspectives.

video:video.video:title: Oasis of the Seas | Amplified Pool Deck in 360º
video:video.video:description:
Goodbye pool daze, hello pool yays — this isn’t dipping a toe in the mellow end. It’s plunging into splashy thrills on the Amplified Oasis of the Seas. Like twin FlowRider surf simulators and the twisting, turning trio of The Perfect Storm waterslides. The most drenchworthy Splashaway Bay aqua park at sea with a Splash Pad for wee ones. And more ways to soak up the sun or enjoy the shade than ever before, with hammocks, swing seats, casitas and daybeds for days. Only on Royal Caribbean. #360video
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Adventure ships out here: http://www.RoyalCaribbean.com
Subscribe to Royal Caribbean on YouTube:
http://youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=RoyalCaribbeanIntl
Royal Caribbean on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/royalcaribbean
Royal Caribbean on Twitter: http://twitter.com/royalcaribbean
Royal Caribbean on Instagram: http://instagram.com/royalcaribbean

video:video.video:title: Awake Your Sense of Wander
video:video.video:description:
We invite you to awake your sense of wander in St. Kitts. Take a leisurely ride on the Caribbean's only authentic scenic passenger train, hike to the rim of a dormant volcano, dive an ancient shipwreck, and taste culinary delights fresh from the sea. Indulge in your wanderlust on an island so full of adventure, you could explore it over a lifetime.
#AwakeYourWanderStKitts

video:video.video:title: Beaches Platinum Protocol of Cleanliness
video:video.video:description:
At Beaches®, we know that the sun, sea, and fresh air are the best medicine of all. And to give you peace of mind while you’re experiencing new adventures and creating wonderful new memories together, Beaches has once again set a new standard of excellence with our Platinum Protocol of Cleanliness. Here’s what we’re doing to help your family stay safe while enjoying paradise.
#BeachesResorts #PlatinumProtocolOfCleanliness #WorryFreeFamilyVacation
videoID:BCHProtocolClean2020

video:video.video:title: Constance Belle Mare Plage - The place to be
video:video.video:description:
Constance Belle Mare Plage in Mauritius is the epitome of luxury Mauritian hotel in the Indian Ocean. Soft white sand, blue sky, turquoise lagoon and exotic trees are the key features of the hotel. Enhanced with beautiful suites and villas, Constance Belle Mare Plage was built and designed for your comfort. A hotel for both relaxation and fun. A magnificent team of experienced professionals are at your service to make your stay memorable! With fine restaurants, trendy bars, Kids Club, Spa, Gym, Championship golf courses, diving, snorkelling, cycling, your stay at Constance Belle Mare Plage will be a happy one. Perfect for honeymooners, family getaways, Babymoon, luxury golf vacation, Spa break, wedding on the beach, Mini-moon getaways, island holidays and more
Visit our official website and book online ► https://www.constancehotels.com Follow us on Twitter ► https://twitter.com/constancehotels Follow us on Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/constancehotels

video:video.video:title: The Wildest Alaska Season Yet | Summer 2021
video:video.video:description:
Get ready to earn your wilderness badge, because Royal Caribbean has never done Alaska like this. The adventure begins Summer 2021 with four unforgettable ships, including the two biggest in the region — Quantum of the Seas, heading to Seattle for the first time ever, and Ovation of the Seas.
Fan-favorites Serenade and Radiance of the Seas also return to the Last Frontier, bringing you closer to Alaska’s rugged beauty with unrivaled views and stops at off-the-beaten-path destinations.
No matter which itinerary you choose, get ready for fjord flightseeing in Juneau, glacier gazing in Alaska’s Inside Passage, and peak seeking in Endicott Arm and Tracy Arm Fjord.
----------------------------------------­­-------------------------- Adventure ships out here: http://www.RoyalCaribbean.com Subscribe to Royal Caribbean on YouTube: http://youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=RoyalCaribbeanIntl Royal Caribbean on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/royalcaribbean Royal Caribbean on Twitter: http://twitter.com/royalcaribbean Royal Caribbean on Instagram: http://instagram.com/royalcaribbean

video:video.video:title: Jurassic World VelociCoaster, Coming Summer 2021 to Universal Orlando Resort
video:video.video:description:
Two intense launches. Four inversions. Feel the rush of the hunt as you race through the jungle alongside Velociraptors on the Jurassic World VelociCoaster, coming Summer 2021 to Universal Orlando Resort.
http://bit.ly/SubscribeUOR
Connect with Universal Orlando: LIKE - Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1g0nBcx FOLLOW - Twitter: http://bit.ly/1q6f38t FOLLOW - Instagram: http://bit.ly/1nct8ij
